title: gentiana austriaca subsp. neilreichii
intro: Gentiana austriaca subsp. neilreichii, also known as Neilreich's gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. The roots and rhizomes of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gentiana austriaca subsp. neilreichii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Gentiana austriaca subsp. neilreichii is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and optimal preparation methods.
